panels.description: Wide shot: A humble, sunlit chapel in Southampton. Fowler, a dashing man in a suit, stands smiling beside Miss Rucastle, who wears a modest white wedding dress. Soft, romantic lighting.

bubbles.text: Fowler and Miss Rucastle were married, by special license, in Southampton the day after their flight.

panels.description: Medium shot: Fowler stands on a lush, tropical beach in Mauritius wearing colonial-era office attire, holding a stack of official government documents. Bright sunlight, palm trees in the background.

bubbles.text: He is now the holder of a government appointment in the island of Mauritius.

panels.description: Medium close-up shot: Holmes sits in his armchair at 221B Baker Street, focused intently on a new case file, ignoring the presence of Miss Violet Hunter who is seen faintly in the background leaving the room, looking slightly dejected.

bubbles.text: Miss Violet Hunter, my friend Holmes, rather to my disappointment, manifested no further interest in her when once she had ceased to be the centre of one of his problems.

panels.description: Wide shot: Miss Violet Hunter standing in front of a prestigious private school in Walsall, smiling confidently while greeting students. The setting is academic, professional, and successful.

bubbles.text: She is now the head of a private school at Walsall, where she has met with considerable success.
